Section: Agentic > SharePoint KM > ASAP Integration > Managed Resource Creation

2. SYSTEM_SHAREPOINT_KM assistant is created and linked to net-001
3. Fulfillment record is present

2. Files are NOT re-downloaded during resync (metadata traversal only)
3. New deltaToken is established and stored in Cosmos
4. Subsequent sync uses the new token

Section: Agentic > SharePoint KM > ASAP Integration > Delta Sync

Expected Result:
1. Resync does NOT call permission-update endpoints
2. deltaToken is re-established via metadata traversal only
3. Stale permission chunks are handled at query-time by Graph Search exclusion
4. No permission data is written to storage during resync

Section: Agentic > SharePoint KM > ASAP Integration > Permission Enforcement

3. Verify returned documents against user A SharePoint permissions
Expected Result:

2. doc2 (restricted) is excluded from results
3. Graph Search BM25 intersection enforced correctly

Section: Agentic > SharePoint KM > ASAP Integration > Permission Enforcement

4. Verify response documents are permission-compliant
Expected Result:

2. Per-doc permission check is applied
3. Final result set contains only permitted documents
4. No unauthorized documents leaked

Section: Agentic > SharePoint KM > ASAP Integration > Permission Enforcement

3. No stale permission data served to user C
